title: Profile Violation — c2pa.created Missing digitalSourceType
description: Verifies that a conformant validator correctly reports a valid claim signature for a manifest where the c2pa.created action is missing the required digitalSourceType field. The signature itself is valid; the non-conformance is a profile-level violation that a profile-aware validator MUST flag separately.

validationStatus.explanation: The claim signature is cryptographically valid even though the manifest is non-conformant at the profile level (missing digitalSourceType).
